819  mr_t* m_mr;
820  option_t<runtime_t> m_runtime ;
821 
822  // constructor
823  deregister_memory_x(mr_t* mr_in) : m_mr(mr_in) {}
824 
825  // setter
826  inline deregister_memory_x&& mr(mr_t* mr_in) { m_mr = mr_in; return std::move(*this); }
827  inline deregister_memory_x&& runtime(runtime_t runtime_in) { m_runtime = runtime_in; return std::move(*this); }
828 
829  void call_impl(mr_t* mr, runtime_t runtime) const;
830  void call() const;
831  inline void operator()() const { return call(); }
832 };
833 
834 inline void deregister_memory(mr_t* mr_in) {
835  return deregister_memory_x(mr_in).call();
836 }
837 
838 
853 class get_rkey_x {
854  public:
855  // args declaration
856  mr_t m_mr;
857  option_t<runtime_t> m_runtime ;
858 
859  // constructor
860  get_rkey_x(mr_t mr_in) : m_mr(mr_in) {}
861 
862  // setter
863  inline get_rkey_x&& mr(mr_t mr_in) { m_mr = mr_in; return std::move(*this); }
864  inline get_rkey_x&& runtime(runtime_t runtime_in) { m_runtime = runtime_in; return std::move(*this); }
865 
866  rkey_t call_impl(mr_t mr, runtime_t runtime) const;
867  rkey_t call() const;
868  inline rkey_t operator()() const { return call(); }
869 };
870 
871 inline rkey_t get_rkey(mr_t mr_in) {
872  return get_rkey_x(mr_in).call();
873 }
874 
875 struct endpoint_attr_t {
876  void* user_context;
877 };
878 
879 class endpoint_impl_t;
880 
894 class endpoint_t {
895  public:
896  using attr_t = endpoint_attr_t;
897  // attribute getter
898  void* get_attr_user_context() const;
899  attr_t get_attr() const;
900  endpoint_impl_t* p_impl = nullptr;
901 
902  endpoint_t() = default;
903  endpoint_t(void* p) : p_impl(static_cast<endpoint_impl_t*>(p)) {}
904  inline bool is_empty() const { return p_impl == nullptr; }
905  inline endpoint_impl_t *get_impl() const { if (!p_impl) throw std::runtime_error("p_impl is nullptr!"); return p_impl; }
906  inline void set_impl(endpoint_impl_t* p) { p_impl = p; }
907  bool operator==(const endpoint_t& other) const { return p_impl == other.p_impl; }
908 };
909 
910 
926 class alloc_endpoint_x {
927  public:
928  // args declaration
929  option_t<runtime_t> m_runtime ;
930  option_t<void*> m_user_context ;
931  option_t<device_t> m_device ;
932 
933  // constructor
934  alloc_endpoint_x() {}
935 
936  // setter
937  inline alloc_endpoint_x&& runtime(runtime_t runtime_in) { m_runtime = runtime_in; return std::move(*this); }
938  inline alloc_endpoint_x&& user_context(void* user_context_in) { m_user_context = user_context_in; return std::move(*this); }
939  inline alloc_endpoint_x&& device(device_t device_in) { m_device = device_in; return std::move(*this); }
940 
941  endpoint_t call_impl(runtime_t runtime, void* user_context, device_t device) const;
942  endpoint_t call() const;
943  inline endpoint_t operator()() const { return call(); }
944 };
945 
946 inline endpoint_t alloc_endpoint() {
947  return alloc_endpoint_x().call();
948 }
949 
950 
965 class free_endpoint_x {
966  public:
967  // args declaration
968  endpoint_t* m_endpoint;
969  option_t<runtime_t> m_runtime ;
970 
971  // constructor
972  free_endpoint_x(endpoint_t* endpoint_in) : m_endpoint(endpoint_in) {}
973 
974  // setter
975  inline free_endpoint_x&& endpoint(endpoint_t* endpoint_in) { m_endpoint = endpoint_in; return std::move(*this); }
976  inline free_endpoint_x&& runtime(runtime_t runtime_in) { m_runtime = runtime_in; return std::move(*this); }
977 
978  void call_impl(endpoint_t* endpoint, runtime_t runtime) const;
979  void call() const;
980  inline void operator()() const { return call(); }
981 };
982 
983 inline void free_endpoint(endpoint_t* endpoint_in) {
984  return free_endpoint_x(endpoint_in).call();
985 }
986

1013  // setter

1015  inline net_poll_cq_x&& device(device_t device_in) { m_device = device_in; return std::move(*this); }
1016  inline net_poll_cq_x&& max_polls(int max_polls_in) { m_max_polls = max_polls_in; return std::move(*this); }
1017 
1018  std::vector<net_status_t> call_impl(runtime_t runtime, device_t device, int max_polls) const;
1019  std::vector<net_status_t> call() const;
1020  inline std::vector<net_status_t> operator()() const { return call(); }

1068  error_t call() const;

1070 };

1461  inline net_post_get_x&& size(size_t size_in) { m_size = size_in; return std::move(*this); }

1463  inline net_post_get_x&& base(uintptr_t base_in) { m_base = base_in; return std::move(*this); }
1464  inline net_post_get_x&& offset(uint64_t offset_in) { m_offset = offset_in; return std::move(*this); }
1465  inline net_post_get_x&& rkey(rkey_t rkey_in) { m_rkey = rkey_in; return std::move(*this); }
1466  inline net_post_get_x&& runtime(runtime_t runtime_in) { m_runtime = runtime_in; return std::move(*this); }
1467  inline net_post_get_x&& endpoint(endpoint_t endpoint_in) { m_endpoint = endpoint_in; return std::move(*this); }
1468  inline net_post_get_x&& user_context(void* user_context_in) { m_user_context = user_context_in; return std::move(*this); }
1469 
1470  error_t call_impl(int rank, void* buffer, size_t size, mr_t mr, uintptr_t base, uint64_t offset, rkey_t rkey, runtime_t runtime, endpoint_t endpoint, void* user_context) const;
1471  error_t call() const;
1472  inline error_t operator()() const { return call(); }
1473 };
1474 
1475 inline error_t net_post_get(int rank_in, void* buffer_in, size_t size_in, mr_t mr_in, uintptr_t base_in, uint64_t offset_in, rkey_t rkey_in) {
1476  return net_post_get_x(rank_in, buffer_in, size_in, mr_in, base_in, offset_in, rkey_in).call();
1477 }
1478 
1479 struct packet_pool_attr_t {
1480  size_t packet_size;
1481  size_t npackets;
1482  size_t pbuffer_size;
1483  void* user_context;
1484 };
1485 
1486 class packet_pool_impl_t;
1487 
1504 class packet_pool_t {
1505  public:
1506  using attr_t = packet_pool_attr_t;
1507  // attribute getter
1508  size_t get_attr_packet_size() const;
1509  size_t get_attr_npackets() const;
1510  size_t get_attr_pbuffer_size() const;
1511  void* get_attr_user_context() const;
1512  attr_t get_attr() const;
1513  packet_pool_impl_t* p_impl = nullptr;
1514 
1515  packet_pool_t() = default;
1516  packet_pool_t(void* p) : p_impl(static_cast<packet_pool_impl_t*>(p)) {}
1517  inline bool is_empty() const { return p_impl == nullptr; }
1518  inline packet_pool_impl_t *get_impl() const { if (!p_impl) throw std::runtime_error("p_impl is nullptr!"); return p_impl; }
1519  inline void set_impl(packet_pool_impl_t* p) { p_impl = p; }
1520  bool operator==(const packet_pool_t& other) const { return p_impl == other.p_impl; }
1521 };
1522 
1523 
1540 class alloc_packet_pool_x {
1541  public:
1542  // args declaration
1543  option_t<runtime_t> m_runtime ;
1544  option_t<size_t> m_packet_size ;
1545  option_t<size_t> m_npackets ;
1546  option_t<void*> m_user_context ;
1547 
1548  // constructor
1549  alloc_packet_pool_x() {}
1550 
1551  // setter
1552  inline alloc_packet_pool_x&& runtime(runtime_t runtime_in) { m_runtime = runtime_in; return std::move(*this); }
1553  inline alloc_packet_pool_x&& packet_size(size_t packet_size_in) { m_packet_size = packet_size_in; return std::move(*this); }
1554  inline alloc_packet_pool_x&& npackets(size_t npackets_in) { m_npackets = npackets_in; return std::move(*this); }
1555  inline alloc_packet_pool_x&& user_context(void* user_context_in) { m_user_context = user_context_in; return std::move(*this); }
1556 
1557  packet_pool_t call_impl(runtime_t runtime, size_t packet_size, size_t npackets, void* user_context) const;
1558  packet_pool_t call() const;
1559  inline packet_pool_t operator()() const { return call(); }
1560 };
1561 
1562 inline packet_pool_t alloc_packet_pool() {
1563  return alloc_packet_pool_x().call();
1564 }

2300 class post_comm_x {
2301  public:
2302  // args declaration
2303  direction_t m_direction;
2304  int m_rank;
2305  void* m_local_buffer;
2306  size_t m_size;
2307  comp_t m_local_comp;
2308  option_t<runtime_t> m_runtime ;
2309  option_t<packet_pool_t> m_packet_pool ;
2310  option_t<endpoint_t> m_endpoint ;
2311  option_t<matching_engine_t> m_matching_engine ;
2312  option_t<comp_semantic_t> m_comp_semantic ;
2313  option_t<mr_t> m_mr ;
2314  option_t<uintptr_t> m_remote_buffer ;
2315  option_t<rkey_t> m_rkey ;
2316  option_t<tag_t> m_tag ;
2317  option_t<rcomp_t> m_remote_comp ;
2318  option_t<void*> m_user_context ;
2319  option_t<buffers_t> m_buffers ;
2320  option_t<rbuffers_t> m_rbuffers ;
2321  option_t<matching_policy_t> m_matching_policy ;
2322  option_t<bool> m_allow_ok ;
2323  option_t<bool> m_allow_posted ;
2324  option_t<bool> m_allow_retry ;
2325  option_t<bool> m_force_zcopy ;
2326 
2327  // constructor
2328  post_comm_x(direction_t direction_in, int rank_in, void* local_buffer_in, size_t size_in, comp_t local_comp_in) : m_direction(direction_in), m_rank(rank_in), m_local_buffer(local_buffer_in), m_size(size_in), m_local_comp(local_comp_in) {}
2329

2357  inline status_t operator()() const { return call(); }
2358 };

2762  // setter
2763  inline post_get_x&& rank(int rank_in) { m_rank = rank_in; return std::move(*this); }
2764  inline post_get_x&& local_buffer(void* local_buffer_in) { m_local_buffer = local_buffer_in; return std::move(*this); }
2765  inline post_get_x&& size(size_t size_in) { m_size = size_in; return std::move(*this); }
2766  inline post_get_x&& local_comp(comp_t local_comp_in) { m_local_comp = local_comp_in; return std::move(*this); }
2767  inline post_get_x&& remote_buffer(uintptr_t remote_buffer_in) { m_remote_buffer = remote_buffer_in; return std::move(*this); }
2768  inline post_get_x&& rkey(rkey_t rkey_in) { m_rkey = rkey_in; return std::move(*this); }
2769  inline post_get_x&& runtime(runtime_t runtime_in) { m_runtime = runtime_in; return std::move(*this); }
2770  inline post_get_x&& packet_pool(packet_pool_t packet_pool_in) { m_packet_pool = packet_pool_in; return std::move(*this); }
2771  inline post_get_x&& endpoint(endpoint_t endpoint_in) { m_endpoint = endpoint_in; return std::move(*this); }
2772  inline post_get_x&& mr(mr_t mr_in) { m_mr = mr_in; return std::move(*this); }
2773  inline post_get_x&& tag(tag_t tag_in) { m_tag = tag_in; return std::move(*this); }
2774  inline post_get_x&& remote_comp(rcomp_t remote_comp_in) { m_remote_comp = remote_comp_in; return std::move(*this); }
2775  inline post_get_x&& user_context(void* user_context_in) { m_user_context = user_context_in; return std::move(*this); }
2776  inline post_get_x&& buffers(buffers_t buffers_in) { m_buffers = buffers_in; return std::move(*this); }
2777  inline post_get_x&& rbuffers(rbuffers_t rbuffers_in) { m_rbuffers = rbuffers_in; return std::move(*this); }
2778  inline post_get_x&& allow_ok(bool allow_ok_in) { m_allow_ok = allow_ok_in; return std::move(*this); }
2779  inline post_get_x&& allow_posted(bool allow_posted_in) { m_allow_posted = allow_posted_in; return std::move(*this); }
2780  inline post_get_x&& allow_retry(bool allow_retry_in) { m_allow_retry = allow_retry_in; return std::move(*this); }
2781  inline post_get_x&& force_zcopy(bool force_zcopy_in) { m_force_zcopy = force_zcopy_in; return std::move(*this); }
2782 
2783  status_t call_impl(int rank, void* local_buffer, size_t size, comp_t local_comp, uintptr_t remote_buffer, rkey_t rkey, runtime_t runtime, packet_pool_t packet_pool, endpoint_t endpoint, mr_t mr, tag_t tag, rcomp_t remote_comp, void* user_context, buffers_t buffers, rbuffers_t rbuffers, bool allow_ok, bool allow_posted, bool allow_retry, bool force_zcopy) const;
2784  status_t call() const;
2785  inline status_t operator()() const { return call(); }
2786 };
2787 
2788 inline status_t post_get(int rank_in, void* local_buffer_in, size_t size_in, comp_t local_comp_in, uintptr_t remote_buffer_in, rkey_t rkey_in) {
2789  return post_get_x(rank_in, local_buffer_in, size_in, local_comp_in, remote_buffer_in, rkey_in).call();
2790 }
2791 
2792 
2808 class progress_x {
2809  public:
2810  // args declaration
2811  option_t<runtime_t> m_runtime ;
2812  option_t<device_t> m_device ;
2813  option_t<endpoint_t> m_endpoint ;
2814 
2815  // constructor
2816  progress_x() {}
2817 
2818  // setter
2819  inline progress_x&& runtime(runtime_t runtime_in) { m_runtime = runtime_in; return std::move(*this); }
2820  inline progress_x&& device(device_t device_in) { m_device = device_in; return std::move(*this); }
2821  inline progress_x&& endpoint(endpoint_t endpoint_in) { m_endpoint = endpoint_in; return std::move(*this); }
2822 
2823  error_t call_impl(runtime_t runtime, device_t device, endpoint_t endpoint) const;
2824  error_t call() const;
2825  inline error_t operator()() const { return call(); }
2826 };
2827 
2828 inline error_t progress() {
2829  return progress_x().call();
2830 }
